proposed_taxonomy.name: Security Alerts
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails related to security measures, unauthorized access alerts, and account verification for user accounts.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Account Verifications
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails requesting confirmation or verification of user accounts, often including codes or links to verify email addresses.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Trade Ideas
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails containing proposed trading strategies, market analyses, and financial instruments recommendations.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Financial Updates
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails providing updates on financial markets, including rates, economic data, and market trends.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Business Notifications
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails from service providers or business platforms regarding subscriptions, licenses, or service renewals.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Newsletters
proposed_taxonomy.description: Subscriptions or briefings summarizing the latest news, analyses, and opinions, typically from news organizations.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Educational Resources
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails offering educational content, courses, or workshops relevant to professional development and skills enhancement.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Internal Communications
proposed_taxonomy.description: Emails intended for internal team communication including project updates, client discussions, and research findings.

proposed_taxonomy.name: Other
proposed_taxonomy.description: Catch-all for items that do not fit other categories
